attributes.style: display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: baseline; padding: 0px 22px 8px;
font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; color: rgb(138, 133, 123); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.09em;

width: 30px; height: 30px; border-radius: 6px; background: rgb(250, 248, 242); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0;
font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: rgb(26, 26, 24); white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis;
